bug.description: protocol timer not started or stopped at the required point in the procedure

prompt:
There is a protocol timer not started or stopped at the required point in the procedure downstream of function eq_auth_reject in the openair3/NAS/NR_UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/NR_UE/5GS/5GMM/MSG/fgmm_authentication_reject.c:62.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
